title: ManHunt
description: A professional Manhunt plugin featuring a unique player-rotation mode (V2) and real-time live-tracking compasses. It automates everything from team setup to automatic world resets after victory.
body:
# **Manhunt (V1 & V2):**
This plugin brings the popular "Minecraft Manhunt" experience to your server with advanced features, a unique rotation mode (V2), and professional tracking tools. Whether you play the classic version or a competitive swap-mode, this plugin handles everything.

Core Features
Dual Game Modes: Choose between V1 (Classic) and V2 (Swap) depending on your group size.

Live Distance Tracking: The tracker compass shows the exact distance and dimension of the Prey directly in the item name.

Dynamic Hunter Chat: Communication between Hunters is private by default. Use @all <message> to talk to the Prey.

Pro-Spectator Tools: Observers and inactive players can instantly teleport between participants using a specialized compass.

Dimension Alerts: Hunters receive immediate visual and acoustic warnings when the Prey enters the Nether or the End.

Smart Ping System: Automatic coordinate broadcasts at configurable intervals.

Auto-Reset System: Automatic world wipes and server restarts after a game ends.

## **The Modes in Detail:**
### Variant 1: Classic Manhunt:
- The traditional experience. One or more permanent Prey players must reach the End and kill the Dragon, while a team of Hunters tries to stop them.

- Static Roles: Your team at the start is your team until the end.

- Multi-Prey Support: All Prey players are active simultaneously.

- Classic Pressure: Constant pursuit without interruptions or swaps.

### Variant 2: Ultimate Rotation:
- Designed for 3+ players where everyone wants to be part of the action. It rotates the "active" Prey role.

- The Active Player: Only one Prey is in Survival mode at a time. They are the only ones who can mine, craft, or take damage.

- The Inactive Players: Other Prey members are forced into Spectator mode. They are kept blind and are constantly teleported to the active player to watch their progress.

- The Swap: Every 60 seconds (configurable), the active player's Inventory, Location, Health, and XP are transferred to the next person.

- Synchronization: No one gets left behind; the whole team moves as one through the dimensions.

## **Commands:**
- /hunter – Join the Hunter team.

- /player – Join the Prey (the one being hunted).
  
- /manhunt start <V1|V2> – Starts the game with the selected mode.
  
- /manhunt stop – Ends the current session and resets roles.
  
- /manhunt pause / resume – Freeze the timer and movement.
  
- /manhunt worldreset – Triggers a manual world deletion and restart.
